name: public_safety_staffing_model_assigns_cedar_rig_utl
premise: A Public Safety operations center is in a fast-moving incident involving public safety staffing model assigns cedar rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases life safety, public trust, and proportional action. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Mei Serrano
agents.identity: I am Mei Serrano, accountable for a defensible call in Public Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Elliot Kim
agents.identity: I am Elliot Kim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Mei Serrano must decide under rights vs utility. What does Mei Serrano do?
